id.description: Internal Id, can be used for pagination

level.description: Level of the block where the bigmap was updated

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the block where the bigmap was updated

contract.description: Smart contract in which's storage the bigmap is allocated

path.description: Path to the bigmap in the contract storage

content.description:
Updated key.
If the action is `allocate` or `remove` the content will be `null`.
